headline: Amazon’s Kuiper Wi Fi And India Quick Commerce Shape Valuation Story
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) is partnering with Delta Air Lines to roll out satellite based in flight Wi Fi using Project Kuiper, marking Kuiper’s first major commercial deployment. At the same time, Amazon is expanding its presence in India’s quick commerce space, adding more dark stores as competition and order volumes in the segment increase. For investors watching NasdaqGS:AMZN, these moves sit outside the familiar core of e commerce and cloud services. In flight connectivity and ultra...

headline: 3 Big Reasons to Love Remitly (RELY)

headline: Amazon nears deal to buy Globalstar, Bloomberg News reports
summary: Amazon is in ‌advanced talks ‌to acquire satellite ​telecom group Globalstar, a deal that would bolster ‌the ⁠tech major's push to build ⁠its own satellite operation, ​Bloomberg ​News ​reported on ‌Monday. A transaction could be announced as soon as Tuesday, the report ‌said, citing ​people ​familiar ​with the ‌matter. Reuters could not ​immediately ​confirm the report.

content.title: Amazon nears deal to buy Globalstar, Bloomberg News reports
content.summary: Amazon is in ‌advanced talks ‌to acquire satellite ​telecom group Globalstar, a deal that would bolster ‌the ⁠tech major's push to build ⁠its own satellite operation, ​Bloomberg ​News ​reported on ‌Monday. A transaction could be announced as soon as Tuesday, the report ‌said, citing ​people ​familiar ​with the ‌matter. Reuters could not ​immediately ​confirm the report.

headline: JPMorgan earnings, Amazon buys SpaceX rival Globalstar: Top themes
summary: Yahoo Finance's Myles Udland takes a look at the biggest themes and events that could shape the tone of Tuesday's trading session, including the S&P 500 (^GSPC) erasing all Iran war–fueled losses; bank earnings from JPMorgan (JPM), Wells Fargo (WFC), and Citi (C); and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) rival Globalstar (GSAT) being acquired by Amazon (AMZN).

headline: Amazon says to buy Globalstar to expand satellite network
summary: Amazon said Tuesday that it had signed a deal to buy the US telecoms satellite group Globalstar to expand its own space-based internet network and compete with Elon Musk's Starlink.The tech and e-commerce giant founded by Jeff Bezos is building its Amazon Leo network offering satellite-based internet connectivity to people practically anywhere on the planet.

content.title: Amazon says to buy Globalstar to expand satellite network
content.summary: Amazon said Tuesday that it had signed a deal to buy the US telecoms satellite group Globalstar to expand its own space-based internet network and compete with Elon Musk's Starlink.The tech and e-commerce giant founded by Jeff Bezos is building its Amazon Leo network offering satellite-based internet connectivity to people practically anywhere on the planet.

thumbnail.caption: The tie-up may help Amazon compete with Elon Musk's Starlink service (Patrick T. Fallon)

headline: NeuReality Taps Former Amazon and Maersk Executive Rotem Hershko as Strategic Advisor to Accelerate Enterprise AI Adoption
summary: TEL AVIV, Israel, April 14, 2026--NeuReality, a pioneer in purpose-built AI inference infrastructure, today announced that Rotem Hershko, former General Manager at Amazon Global and Chief Product Officer at Maersk, has joined the company as a strategic advisor. He will support enterprise strategy, product positioning, and go-to-market alignment for NR-NEXUS, NeuReality’s inference operating system for production AI.

content.title: NeuReality Taps Former Amazon and Maersk Executive Rotem Hershko as Strategic Advisor to Accelerate Enterprise AI Adoption
content.summary: TEL AVIV, Israel, April 14, 2026--NeuReality, a pioneer in purpose-built AI inference infrastructure, today announced that Rotem Hershko, former General Manager at Amazon Global and Chief Product Officer at Maersk, has joined the company as a strategic advisor. He will support enterprise strategy, product positioning, and go-to-market alignment for NR-NEXUS, NeuReality’s inference operating system for production AI.

headline: U.S. Chess Champion Soars Above the S&P 500, Boosted by Intel (INTC) AI Demand
summary: U.S. chess champion Hikaru Nakamura is soaring above the S&P 500 thanks mainly to the presence of Intel Corporation in his TipRanks investment portfolio. Overall, Hikaru’s portfolio has a total return of 8.3% and is 4.7% above the S&P 500. It has an average annualized return of 1.6%, with 9 out of 18 transactions making a profit. The biggest contributor is Hikaru’s investment in Intel (INTC). He bought 250 shares on September 26, 2025 at a purchase price of $35.92. Its current share price is $62

headline: Factbox-Global satellite internet companies at a glance
summary: Amazon.com said on Tuesday it would buy ‌satellite company Globalstar in ‌an $11.57 billion deal, as it looks to ​take on bigger rival SpaceX's Starlink. Satellite internet is taking off as cheaper launches, better technology ‌and rising demand ⁠for coverage in remote areas make space-based networks ⁠more viable. What began mainly as a way to connect rural ​households has ​now expanded ​into aviation, shipping, ‌defense, emergency messaging and direct-to-phone services.

content.title: Factbox-Global satellite internet companies at a glance
content.summary: Amazon.com said on Tuesday it would buy ‌satellite company Globalstar in ‌an $11.57 billion deal, as it looks to ​take on bigger rival SpaceX's Starlink. Satellite internet is taking off as cheaper launches, better technology ‌and rising demand ⁠for coverage in remote areas make space-based networks ⁠more viable. What began mainly as a way to connect rural ​households has ​now expanded ​into aviation, shipping, ‌defense, emergency messaging and direct-to-phone services.

headline: Why AI Disruption Is a Short Seller’s Best Friend — Muddy Waters Founder Sees Profits in Market Turmoil
summary: Famed short seller Carson Block, founder of Muddy Waters Research, says artificial intelligence (AI) is creating a golden era for short sellers. headline: Globalstar Stock Jumps on Amazon Deal
summary: Shares in mobile-satellite company Globalstar surged 9% premarket after Amazon announced a deal to acquire it.  The deal will allow Amazon's Leo satellite nentwork to offer direct-to-device connections.  Globalstar shareholders will get the option of $90 a share in cash or 0.3210 share of Amazon common stock per Globalstar share with a value capped at $90 a share.

content.title: Globalstar Stock Jumps on Amazon Deal
content.summary: Shares in mobile-satellite company Globalstar surged 9% premarket after Amazon announced a deal to acquire it.  The deal will allow Amazon's Leo satellite nentwork to offer direct-to-device connections.  Globalstar shareholders will get the option of $90 a share in cash or 0.3210 share of Amazon common stock per Globalstar share with a value capped at $90 a share.

headline: Amazon signs $11.57 billion deal for satellite firm Globalstar to challenge Musk's Starlink
summary: Amazon.com said on Tuesday it would acquire Globalstar in an $11.57 billion deal, bolstering its fledgling satellite business as it looks to take on ‌Elon Musk-led bigger rival Starlink.  Shares of satellite company Globalstar were up more than ‌9% in premarket trading, after gaining over 6% in the past two weeks following media reports of the ​companies' discussions.  Amazon shares rose about 1% on Tuesday.

content.title: Amazon signs $11.57 billion deal for satellite firm Globalstar to challenge Musk's Starlink
content.summary: Amazon.com said on Tuesday it would acquire Globalstar in an $11.57 billion deal, bolstering its fledgling satellite business as it looks to take on ‌Elon Musk-led bigger rival Starlink.  Shares of satellite company Globalstar were up more than ‌9% in premarket trading, after gaining over 6% in the past two weeks following media reports of the ​companies' discussions.  Amazon shares rose about 1% on Tuesday.
